SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-24-2009 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO APR-09-2009 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT MERCURY INSURANCE DISMISSED AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST.
